records.m_Talk_ENG: Here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: These are... mushrooms? Why are you giving me them?
records.m_Talk_DEU: These are... mushrooms? Why are you giving me them?
records.m_Talk_FRA: These are... mushrooms? Why are you giving me them?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nutrients.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nutrients.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nutrients.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When you're tired, it'll help you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I-I'm okay. I am tired, but not hungry enough to eat these.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You eat them raw...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You eat them raw...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You eat them raw...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is... that so?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Here. This is my home.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Here. This is my home.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Here. This is my home.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Welcome.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Welcome.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Welcome.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Unbelievable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Unbelievable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Unbelievable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's covered in grass.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's covered in grass.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's covered in grass.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It looks like this place was used as a workshop, and the equipment seems to be in good condition.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It looks like this place was used as a workshop, and the equipment seems to be in good condition.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It looks like this place was used as a workshop, and the equipment seems to be in good condition.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's that sound...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's that sound...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's that sound...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The answer is, Shepherd trimming her horns.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The answer is, Shepherd trimming her horns.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The answer is, Shepherd trimming her horns.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd...? Did you... just put those horns on your head into a grinder?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd...? Did you... just put those horns on your head into a grinder?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd...? Did you... just put those horns on your head into a grinder?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh-huh. Shepherd's horns keep growing, so Shepherd needs to trim them every day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh-huh. Shepherd's horns keep growing, so Shepherd needs to trim them every day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh-huh. Shepherd's horns keep growing, so Shepherd needs to trim them every day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's dangerous! What if you get hurt...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's dangerous! What if you get hurt...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's dangerous! What if you get hurt...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if it grows too much, it's heavy and uncomfortable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if it grows too much, it's heavy and uncomfortable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if it grows too much, it's heavy and uncomfortable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since when... have you been living like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since when... have you been living like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since when... have you been living like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd doesn't know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd doesn't know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd doesn't know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>The person dear to Shepherd</color> told me not to count the days.
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>The person dear to Shepherd</color> told me not to count the days.
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>The person dear to Shepherd</color> told me not to count the days.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone dear to you? Do you mean that corpse lying over there?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone dear to you? Do you mean that corpse lying over there?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone dear to you? Do you mean that corpse lying over there?

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's not a corpse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's not a corpse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's not a corpse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's just out of batteries because he sang me lullabies for so long.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's just out of batteries because he sang me lullabies for so long.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's just out of batteries because he sang me lullabies for so long.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's recharging right now. So Shepherd has to take care of him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's recharging right now. So Shepherd has to take care of him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's recharging right now. So Shepherd has to take care of him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He's... recharging?
records.m_Talk_DEU: He's... recharging?
records.m_Talk_FRA: He's... recharging?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd, you said you made a promise to stay home, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd, you said you made a promise to stay home, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd, you said you made a promise to stay home, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you make that promise with him?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you make that promise with him?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you make that promise with him?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh-huh. Shepherd mustn't break the promise with him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Uh-huh. Shepherd mustn't break the promise with him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh-huh. Shepherd mustn't break the promise with him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you chased away the C.O.s that were trying to attack me twice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you chased away the C.O.s that were trying to attack me twice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you chased away the C.O.s that were trying to attack me twice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why didn't you hide like you promised? Why did you help me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why didn't you hide like you promised? Why did you help me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why didn't you hide like you promised? Why did you help me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I can see people's <color=#ffd34c>hearts</color>.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I can see people's <color=#ffd34c>hearts</color>.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I can see people's <color=#ffd34c>hearts</color>.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yours is similar in shape and color with the person dear to Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yours is similar in shape and color with the person dear to Shepherd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yours is similar in shape and color with the person dear to Shepherd.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My heart...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: My heart...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: My heart...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then... you only helped me because you thought I was him?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then... you only helped me because you thought I was him?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then... you only helped me because you thought I was him?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Uh-huh.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Uh-huh.

records.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay.
records.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay.
records.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, she suddenly fell.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, she suddenly fell.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, she suddenly fell.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sleepy?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sleepy?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sleepy?

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, I just suddenly got weak in the knees.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, I just suddenly got weak in the knees.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, I just suddenly got weak in the knees.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Learning that I was just lucky that you came to save my life. What a let-down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Learning that I was just lucky that you came to save my life. What a let-down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Learning that I was just lucky that you came to save my life. What a let-down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's a relief.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's a relief.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's a relief.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because if you don't come down, you'll get too high and fall.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Because if you don't come down, you'll get too high and fall.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah... Thanks for telling me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah... Thanks for telling me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah... Thanks for telling me.

root.m_Talk_FRA: I can see people's <color=#ffd34c>hearts</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yours is similar in shape and color with the person dear to Shepherd.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yours is similar in shape and color with the person dear to Shepherd.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yours is similar in shape and color with the person dear to Shepherd.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My heart...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: My heart...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: My heart...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Then... you only helped me because you thought I was him?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Then... you only helped me because you thought I was him?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Then... you only helped me because you thought I was him?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uh-huh.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Uh-huh.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Uh-huh.

root.m_Talk_ENG: O-okay.
root.m_Talk_DEU: O-okay.
root.m_Talk_FRA: O-okay.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, she suddenly fell.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, she suddenly fell.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, she suddenly fell.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you sleepy?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you sleepy?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you sleepy?

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, I just suddenly got weak in the knees.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, I just suddenly got weak in the knees.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, I just suddenly got weak in the knees.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Learning that I was just lucky that you came to save my life. What a let-down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Learning that I was just lucky that you came to save my life. What a let-down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Learning that I was just lucky that you came to save my life. What a let-down.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's a relief.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's a relief.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's a relief.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Because if you don't come down, you'll get too high and fall.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Because if you don't come down, you'll get too high and fall.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Because if you don't come down, you'll get too high and fall.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yeah... Thanks for telling me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yeah... Thanks for telling me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yeah... Thanks for telling me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Shepherd, would it be okay if I look at your friend over there?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Shepherd, would it be okay if I look at your friend over there?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Shepherd, would it be okay if I look at your friend over there?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Friend...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Friend...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Friend...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Uh... <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to you</color>.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Uh... <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to you</color>.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Uh... <color=#ffd34c>the person dear to you</color>.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm just going to check what he's wearing. I <color=#ffd34c>promise</color> I won't touch him.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm just going to check what he's wearing. I <color=#ffd34c>promise</color> I won't touch him.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm just going to check what he's wearing. I <color=#ffd34c>promise</color> I won't touch him.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Okay, but be careful.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Okay, but be careful.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Okay, but be careful.
